name: clipboard-hub
description: Self-hosted shared clipboard hub for Mac and Windows clients.

scripts.icons: swift scripts/make-icons.swift && iconutil -c icns assets/ClipboardSync.iconset -o assets/ClipboardSync.icns && node scripts/png-to-ico.mjs assets/app-icon.png assets/ClipboardSync.ico
scripts.package:release: npm run clean && npm run icons && npm run package:mac && npm run package:win && node scripts/fix-mac-plist.mjs && node scripts/write-public-client-config.mjs && node scripts/write-mac-local-proxy.mjs && node scripts/write-mac-paste-helper.mjs && node scripts/sign-mac-app.mjs && node scripts/create-mac-dmg.mjs && cd dist && zip -qr -X ClipboardSync-windows-x64.zip ClipboardSync-win32-x64 && node ../scripts/verify-public-package-artifacts.mjs && node ../scripts/write-release-manifest.mjs && node ../scripts/verify-release-manifest.mjs && node ../scripts/clean-package-build-dirs.mjs
scripts.package:configured: npm run clean && npm run icons && npm run package:mac && npm run package:win && node scripts/fix-mac-plist.mjs && node scripts/inject-client-config.mjs && node scripts/write-mac-local-proxy.mjs && node scripts/write-mac-paste-helper.mjs && node scripts/sign-mac-app.mjs && node scripts/create-mac-dmg.mjs && cd dist && zip -qr -X ClipboardSync-windows-x64.zip ClipboardSync-win32-x64 && node ../scripts/verify-package-artifacts.mjs && node ../scripts/write-release-manifest.mjs && node ../scripts/verify-release-manifest.mjs && node ../scripts/clean-package-build-dirs.mjs
